## ⚠️ Important Notice

**This issue should be created automatically from an approved Discussion.**

If you're creating this manually, please follow the official workflow:

1. Create a Discussion in the "Ideas" category
2. Add the `approved` label to the discussion
3. The system will automatically create an issue and add it to the project board

See the [README](https://github.com/Uchida16104/TaskBoard#usage) for detailed instructions.
